fail_ledger.reason: Synthetic negative fixture asserts the wrong sign TQF_r = TQF_b instead of TQF_r = -TQF_b.

source_attribution: Wildberger, Chromogeometry, Math. Intelligencer 30:26-38, 2008; Wildberger, Divine Proportions, 2005; Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-14

witnesses.verdict: 3000 deterministic sample triangles from [1..9]^2 have zero sign-identity violations
on all C(81,3) triples, zero TQF iff collinear for blue/red/green
